message:
feat(core): add zero-copy ingestion parser with line boundary detection (ft-2p9cb.3.2.1)

IngestParser with zero-copy byte-slice processing, line boundary detection,
partial buffering, max-line overflow rejection, flush, zero-copy ratio tracking,
IngestChunk/ParseResult/IngestParserSnapshot types. 16 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
